name: TUONELA
short_description: Descend down to the dark hellish realms of madness and despair and fight your way through hordes of undead, demons and other creatures of nightmarish powers. Collect treasures and unlock more heroes as you journey through the underworld alone or with your friends.
detailed_description:
TUONELA is a roguelike survival game where you will choose among many heroes and battle your way through the endless hordes of undead, demons and many other foes. Set in medieval times and using 90s graphical look. Venture deep in the savage realm of Nendhir alone or with your friends. Gain new powers, collect gold to unlock more heroes and descend down to the dark hellish realms of madness and despair.

Features

  • Slay monsters alone or with friends

  • 90s style 64-bit look

  • Many different abilities for unique playthrough each round

  • Quests

  • Fishing and cooking

  • Multiple different heroes to unlock and choose from
